steps.title: Identify the causal signal
steps.content: The plant absorbs and stores manganese; [blank] soil concentrations decrease. The blank needs a word showing consequence or result.

steps.title: Apply the causal signal to the choices
steps.content:
”In turn” expresses consequence—the plant's absorption directly yields the decrease in soil concentrations. “Nevertheless” signals contrast, “in addition” signals accumulation, and “specifically” signals narrowing or specification, none of which show cause-and-effect.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
